name: Metriq — Prompt Optimizer
description: Detects any AI chatbot (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, Kimi, DeepSeek, Perplexity, and more), reads the prompt you're drafting, and rewrites it into a focused one — so you burn fewer tokens and hit usage limits less often.

action.default_title: Metriq — click to open settings; on an AI chatbot use the ✦ button to optimize your prompt
